AI is incredible. Surprise bills are not.

Enterprises are shifting from AI experimentation to large-scale Agentic-AI operations. I had the opportunity to share how AI Data Cloud powers autonomous workflows and intelligent data products. Through real-world customer stories, we highlighted how organizations, leveraging the Accenture–Snowflake business group, can modernize their data estate and transform Snowflake into a high-performance engine for AI-driven decision-making and measurable business outcomes.

It was a privilege to meet and engage in conversation with Sridhar Ramaswamy,CEO of Snowflake. We discussed the future of Agentic-AI and explored ideas around Cortex Code, which was both insightful and energizing. His simplicity, insightful thinking, and vision for enterprise AI remain a great source of motivation for me.
